no_anomaly_coverage.searched_population: Records R004236 and R004237 (direct lookup by record_id)
no_anomaly_coverage.query_conditions: Retrieved expense details for R004236 and R004237 via get_expense_detail; searched policy corpus for split reimbursement rules

checked_rules.conclusion: Not a violation — date interval (8 days) exceeds 7-day threshold

no_anomaly_coverage.conclusion: No anomaly. R004236 and R004237 share the same employee (E0010), same expense type (travel_lodging), and same vendor (安程酒店管理有限公司), with combined amount ¥10,400 reaching the AR-03 higher approval line. However, their expense dates (2025-10-01 and 2025-10-09) are 8 days apart, exceeding the 7-day threshold defined in Article 11 of 费用报销管理办法. The split reimbursement rule's three conditions are not all satisfied; therefore no violation exists.
